fields.title: Digital School Management System (DSMS)
fields.description: Enterprise school platform deployed in 3 secondary schools in Juba. Handles student registration, attendance, grading, fee management, teacher dashboards, and course registration. Works online and offline.

fields.title: Resume Screening AI App
fields.description: Intelligent hiring tool using NLP and ML to match resumes to job descriptions and rank candidates by relevance.

fields.title: SpeedyServe Food Delivery
fields.description: Mobile app for ordering food from local restaurants with real-time delivery tracking and integrated payments.

fields.title: Agricultural Management Platform
fields.description: Connects farmers, equipment owners, transporters, and buyers on a single platform to reduce agricultural logistics disconnection.

fields.title: Ashesi Market E-Commerce
fields.description: Campus marketplace enabling student vendors to list products, accept payments, and allow peer-to-peer borrowing.

fields.title: Eco-Adventure Tourism Platform
fields.description: Travel booking platform for selecting destinations, reserving accommodations, and completing payments online.

fields.title: SuddTech Company Website
fields.description: Official website for SuddTech, a software company offering web, app, and digital product services.

selecting schools across different administrative zones of Juba to reflect the geographic and institutional diversity of the private secondary school sector. Instrument validity threats will be addressed through the content and construct validity procedures in Section 3.7, supplemented by pilot testing and item revision. Researcher bias in qualitative analysis will be mitigated through reflexive journal practice and peer review of preliminary thematic analyses. The limitation of cross-sectional data for causal inference will be explicitly acknowledged in the discussion of findings.
